sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108403" key="u(poqea/trous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποθεάτρους</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλοὺς τοὺς ἐπὶ τοῖς νόμοις τοῖς αὐλητικοῖς ἐκάλεσαν,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.82</biblScope> </bibl>; perh. cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπόθετρον.</foreign> </entryFree>
